queries.question: List the three longest-running shows and number of their episodes.
queries.sql: SELECT title, Number_of_episodes FROM Show ORDER BY Number_of_episodes DESC LIMIT 3;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?number_of_episodes WHERE {
  ?show a :Show .
  ?show p:title ?title .
  ?show p:Number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes .
  ?show p:Number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_episodes_o)
LIMIT 3

queries.question: List the three longest-running shows and number of their seasons and episodes.
queries.sql: SELECT title, Number_of_seasons, Number_of_episodes FROM Show ORDER BY Number_of_seasons, Number_of_episodes DESC LIMIT 3;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?number_of_seasons ?number_of_episodes WHERE {
  ?show a :Show .
  ?show p:title ?title .
  ?show p:Number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons .
  ?show p:Number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes .
  ?show p:Number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons_o .
  ?show p:Number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?number_of_seasons_o) DESC(?number_of_episodes_o)
LIMIT 3

queries.question: Give me the title, number of seasons and release year of all comedy shows
queries.sql: SELECT title, Number_of_seasons, release_year FROM Show WHERE genre = 'Comedy';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?number_of_seasons ?release_year WHERE {
  ?show a :Show .
  ?show p:title ?title .
  ?show p:Number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons .
  ?show p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?show p:genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Comedy")
}

queries.question: List the three longest-running shows and their duration.
queries.sql: SELECT title, Number_of_seasons FROM Show ORDER BY Number_of_seasons DESC LIMIT 3;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?number_of_seasons WHERE {
  ?show a :Show .
  ?show p:title ?title .
  ?show p:Number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons .
  ?show p:Number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_seasons_o)
LIMIT 3

queries.question: Give me the title, number of seasons and episodes, and release year of all comedy shows
queries.sql: SELECT title, Number_of_seasons, Number_of_episodes, release_year FROM Show WHERE genre = 'Comedy';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?number_of_seasons ?number_of_episodes ?release_year WHERE {
  ?show a :Show .
  ?show p:title ?title .
  ?show p:Number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons .
  ?show p:Number_of_episodes ?number_of_episodes .
  ?show p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?show p:genre ?genre_f .
  FILTER(STR(?genre_f) = "Comedy")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the three longest-running shows and their duration.
What are the titles, durations and release years of all comedy shows?
